home_desc: Real-time tracking of your vehicle's health and telemetry.
logs_desc: Add telemetry logs and track fuel efficiency.
routes_desc: Track your rides and estimate fuel consumption per route.
maintenance_desc: Keep a detailed history of your mechanical services and costs.
profile_desc: Manage details, insurance, and photos of your vehicle.
manuals_desc: Store and read your motorcycle manuals offline.
settings_desc: Configure language, units, and local storage settings.
terms_desc: Read the terms and conditions of using NAVE app.
privacy_desc: Read our local data privacy policy.
